---
title: "Wu Jia Yan"
subtitle: "IT Business & Data Analytics Professional"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
---

::: callout-note
**Contact:** +65 8206 3291\
**Email:** [jiayan.wu.2025\@mitb.smu.edu.sg](mailto:jiayan.wu.2025@mitb.smu.edu.sg)\
**Citizenship:** Singapore Citizen\
**Portfolio:** [mitb-projects.vercel.app](https://mitb-projects.vercel.app/)
:::

## Core Skills

**Data Analytics**

:   Combines business-technology delivery experience with applied skills in Python, R, Tableau, machine learning, and data visualization.

**Business & Systems**

:   ERP requirements gathering, stakeholder coordination, project scheduling, issue resolution, workflow/interface design, documentation, progress and change reporting.

**Project Delivery**

:   Coordination, Change Management, Reporting.

## Education

### Singapore Management University, Singapore
**Aug 2025 - Present**\
Master of IT in Business\
Cumulative GPA: **3.47 / 4.00**

### Oxford Brookes University, United Kingdom
**Jun 2018 - Mar 2024**\
Bachelor of Science in Applied Accounting

### University of Leicester, United Kingdom
**Oct 2009 - Jan 2011**\
Master of Science in Marketing

### University of Sunderland, United Kingdom
**Jan 2008 - Mar 2009**\
BA in Business Management

## Selected MITB Projects

### HDB Resale Price Prediction using Ensemble Machine Learning

**Tools:** Python, pandas, scikit-learn, Jupyter Notebook\
Developed a machine learning model to predict future Singapore HDB resale prices using historical transaction data and engineered housing features. Built a stacking ensemble model that outperformed baseline methods, achieving $R^2 = 0.7314$ and RMSE = 865.13.\
[View project report](../Projects/Applied%20Machine%20Learning/)

### Airbnb Dynamic Pricing & Revenue Optimization Model

**Tools:** Python, Random Forest, predictive analytics\
Built a predictive pricing model to recommend Airbnb nightly rates by balancing booking probability and expected revenue. Trained a Random Forest model that achieved ROC-AUC = 0.8441 and generated optimized pricing recommendations for new listings.\
[View project report](../Projects/Data%20Science%20for%20Business/)

### MySQL Query Performance Optimization for Airbnb Search

**Tools:** MySQL, SQL, Database Optimization\
Evaluated FULLTEXT indexing against wildcard search queries to improve keyword search efficiency on Airbnb listing datasets. Achieved approximately 90% average runtime reduction, with selected search scenarios improving by over 20x.\
[View project report](../Projects/Query%20Processing%20and%20Optimisation/)

### AI-Assisted Trade Surveillance for Financial Misconduct Detection

**Tools:** Google AI Studio, Generative AI, Prompt Engineering\
Designed an AI-assisted workflow to detect suspicious trader communications, including market manipulation and confidential information leakage. Compared traditional keyword searches with contextual AI analysis to improve compliance monitoring and misconduct detection.\
[View project report](../Projects/Data%20Science%20for%20Financial%20Service/)

## Professional Experience

### Shanghai Zhenghe Communication Equipment Leasing Co., Ltd.
**Nov 2016 - Nov 2022**\
Project Manager / ERP System Manager

- Coordinated schedules, resources, documentation, and cross-functional activities across project stages.
- Translated business needs into ERP functional requirements and clarified enhancement requests with software developers.
- Supported user-friendly ERP interface and workflow design aligned with operational processes and stakeholder needs.
- Monitored progress, risks, and changes; prepared stakeholder updates and close-out reports; and coordinated issue resolution.

### Simplified Chinese Linguist | Keywords International Pte Ltd
**Mar 2015 - Oct 2016**

- Translated, reviewed, proofread, and performed linguistic QA for Simplified Chinese content across assigned projects.
- Created and maintained glossaries, terminology guidelines, and language resources to improve consistency and quality.
- Reviewed vendor tests, supported testing teams, and collaborated with project managers and multilingual teams.
- Guided junior linguists and contributed to quality improvement and process enhancement initiatives.

### Translator cum Game Master | IGG Singapore Pte Ltd
**Jun 2013 - Feb 2015**

- Localized game content, advertisements, training documents, legal documents, and player-facing materials between Chinese and English.
- Produced English marketing copy, and supported publication across social media and community channels.
- Resolved player issues; escalated feedback to project teams and was promoted to team leader.

### Editor | Singapore Children Newspaper
**Feb 2011 - Aug 2011**

- Selected and edited publication content, translated journals and documents between Chinese and English, and designed marketing materials.

## Source Document

[Download the original resume](Wu_Jiayan_Resume.docx)
